human_approval_required_for: skipping the test-first cycle (forbidden by Iron Law)
writing production code before a failing test exists
iron_law: NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST

boundaries.produces: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline applied to feature implementation and bug fixes
boundaries.does_not_produce: the test framework setup itself (use the project's existing test runner), test data fixtures (project-specific)
boundaries.does_not_handle: characterization tests for refactoring (use refactor-workflow phase baseline)
